name: Dragon Fruit
description: The Dragon Fruit transforms the user into a powerful Eastern Dragon. Currently considered the most well-rounded fruit in the game — it combines flight, high burst damage, and a full dragon transformation.

skills.name: Dragon Claw
skills.desc: Slashes with massive dragon claws, knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Dragon Breath
skills.desc: Breathes a stream of fire dealing continuous damage in a wide arc.

skills.name: Dragon Flight
skills.desc: Full dragon transformation — transforms user into a dragon for high-speed flight.

pros: Strong in both PvP and PvE
cons: Mythical rarity — very hard to obtain
howToGet: Fruit Spin, Buy with Cash, or Trading. Highly demanded.

name: Light Fruit
description: Grants the user the ability to create, control, and transform into light. It has the fastest movement speed in the game, making it legendary for grinding.

skills.name: Light Beam
skills.desc: Fires a concentrated laser beam that travels instantly.

skills.name: Light Barrage
skills.desc: Rains down dozens of light arrows on a target area.

skills.name: Light Speed Flight
skills.desc: Transforms user into pure light for instant travel across islands.

pros: Logia immunity to low level mobs
cons: Linear attacks can be dodged in PvP
Damage falls off against top-tier endgame bosses
howToGet: Fruit Dealer, Gacha Spins, or Finding under trees.

name: Kitsune Fruit
description: The peak of mobility and burst damage. Transform into a legendary nine-tailed fox. Excels in rapid PvP combos and absolute battlefield dominance.

skills.name: Tails of Vengeance
skills.desc: Unleashes all 9 tails in a massive AOE strike.

howToGet: Extreme luck in Gacha, high-tier trading.

name: Fiend Fruit
description: A very solid mid-game fruit focusing on life-steal and shadow manipulation. Great for sustaining health during boss fights.

skills.name: Nightmare Realm
skills.desc: Traps enemies in a dark sphere.
